Climate Central

Climate Central

data planning

About

Comprehensive climate risk assessment tool for local communities with visualization and data analytics

Overview

Climate Central is a leading online resource for climate science reporting and analysis. Their interactive tools help communities understand climate risks and inform adaptation planning.

Key Features

  • Climate Risk Dashboard: Visual representation of local climate risks including extreme heat, precipitation, flooding, and sea level rise
  • Sea Level Rise Viewer: Interactive maps showing potential flooding impacts at different elevation levels
  • Extreme Weather Analysis: Historical trends and projections for extreme weather events
  • Customizable Reports: Generate tailored climate risk assessments for specific locations
  • Data Visualization: Professional maps and charts suitable for presentations and reports

Use Cases

  • Municipal climate adaptation planning
  • Community engagement and education
  • Climate risk communication for stakeholders
  • Evidence-based decision making for urban planning
  • Insurance and real estate risk assessment

Getting Started

  1. Visit Climate Central
  2. Navigate to the tools section
  3. Select your location of interest
  4. Explore interactive maps and data visualizations
  5. Generate and export reports

Integration

Climate Central tools can be embedded in websites and used via their public API. They provide integration examples for common platforms.

API Access

  • Public data API available
  • Authentication: API key required
  • Rate limits: Standard tier available
  • Documentation: Comprehensive API docs available

Pricing

Free Tier

  • Access to all public tools
  • Basic visualization features
  • Standard reporting capabilities

Enterprise

  • Custom data integration
  • Advanced analytics
  • Dedicated support
  • White-label options

Resources

  • Documentation
  • GitHub Repository
  • API Documentation
  • Community Forum

Support

  • Contact: info@climatecentral.org
  • Support: Help Center
  • Community: Active development and user community

Related Tools

  • i-Tree Tools (Forest carbon and benefits)
  • NOAA Sea Level Rise Viewer (Detailed projections)
  • City Energy Dashboard (Energy consumption tracking)
